title: Move the Comments Button/Updates Panel to its own Column
excerpt:
Every time I try to edit the title of a task - the updates/comments panel opens. 
Please either move it to its own column or give users the ability to hide or allow/prevent drill down to that panel on their boards if the…

posts.author: skelly (Shane Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Every time I try to edit the title of a task - the updates/comments panel opens.

Please either move it to its own column or give users the ability to hide or allow/prevent drill down to that panel on their boards if they don’t have a use. For example its sometimes useful on the primary task - but completly overkill on the secondary tasks.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you click inside the name column and outside the current text, the update panel opens. If you click inside the name column and inside the current text the update panel does not open and you can edit the text.

Hope that helps.
